heroSub: Free calculator based on EU261, UK261, APPR, US DOT, Korea, Saudi Arabia, etc.
directFlightNote: ✈ Direct flights only. For connecting flights, please enter your final destination.
ticketPriceNote: Used for accurate calculation under Korean and Saudi GACA regulations
guidelineNote: ⚠ Non-binding administrative guideline. If refused, file a complaint with the Korea Consumer Agency.
refundOnlyNote: No cash compensation under US DOT rules, but you are entitled to a full automatic refund for cancellations or significant changes.
montrealNote: No fixed cash compensation applies to this flight. Keep receipts for hotel, meals, and transport costs incurred due to the delay, and submit them to the airline. Claim deadline: 2 years from departure.

explanations.eligible: This flight meets the eligibility criteria for compensation.
explanations.early_notice: You were notified of the cancellation 14+ days before departure. No cash compensation applies, but you may request a full refund or rebooking.
explanations.weather_exempt: Weather and natural disasters are exempt from cash compensation. However, the airline must still provide meals and accommodation while you wait (Care Rights).
explanations.extraordinary_exempt: War, terrorism, or security threats are exempt from compensation.
explanations.refund_only: US regulations do not provide punitive cash compensation. However, you are entitled to a full automatic refund if the flight is cancelled or significantly changed.
explanations.montreal_fallback: No fixed compensation regulation applies. Submit actual expense receipts (hotel, meals, rebooking fees) to the airline for reimbursement.
explanations.appr_eligible: Canada APPR applies. Compensation ranges from CAD $400–$1,000 (large carrier) or $125–$500 (small carrier) depending on final arrival delay.
explanations.korea_cancellation: Korea Consumer Dispute Resolution Standard applies. Additional compensation may be claimed beyond the ticket refund (non-binding guideline).
explanations.gaca_cancel_percent: Saudi GACA regulations entitle you to a percentage of your ticket value as compensation.
explanations.dgca_eligible: India DGCA regulations apply. Up to ₹20,000 depending on scheduled block time and actual delay.
explanations.anac_refund_only: Brazil ANAC has no fixed cash compensation. You are entitled to a full refund or alternative flight.

disclaimerBody: This is reference information based on public regulations. Actual compensation depends on airline decisions.
savedResult: Result saved — you can return to this page anytime

refundDesc: Full refunds are available if the service was not delivered. Go to Payment History and click the Polar.sh Customer Portal link to request a refund.
